name: ASStateCache
brief_description: Circular buffer for high-performance state caching and rollback.
description:
ASStateCache provides optimized state management for multiplayer games
		requiring rollback and prediction capabilities. Uses a circular buffer
		to store recent state snapshots with minimal memory overhead.

		Key features:
		- Circular buffer with configurable size (default: 128 entries)
		- Fast O(1) capture and restore operations
		- Automatic buffer management with overwrite protection
		- Serialization support for save/load operations
		- Debug utilities for state inspection

		Used internally by ASComponent for high-frequency state capture
		during multiplayer gameplay, with fallback to ASStateSnapshot for
		long-term storage or save games.

methods.name: capture_state
methods.description:
Captures the current state of the ASComponent into the cache buffer.
				Automatically increments tick and manages circular buffer indexing.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Clears all cached state entries and resets the cache.

methods.name: deserialize
methods.description: Loads cache data from a previously serialized Array.

methods.name: dump_cache
methods.description: Prints detailed cache information to the console for debugging.

methods.name: get_available_ticks
methods.description: Returns an array of all tick numbers currently stored in the cache.

methods.name: get_current_tick
methods.description: Returns the current tick number of the cache.

methods.name: get_used_slots
methods.description: Returns the number of cache slots currently in use.

methods.name: has_tick
methods.description: Returns true if the cache contains an entry for the specified tick.

methods.name: restore_state
methods.description:
Restores the ASComponent state from the cached entry at the specified tick.
				Returns true if successful, false if tick not found in cache.

methods.name: serialize
methods.description: Serializes all valid cache entries to an Array for storage.
